sources.videoTitle: EVERYTHING BUT KANTO CUP CHALLENGE!! | Pokémon GO Battle League
sources.author: Reis2TheOccasion

performanceNotes: All three Pokemon were single-moved, described as 'absolute shenanigans'
Missing Sludge on Galarian Weezing was a notable weakness
Galarian Articuno's Fly forced shields effectively despite the meme build
description: Triple Galarian meme team — all three Pokemon running single charge moves. Galarian Mr. Mime leads with Confusion, Galarian Articuno safe swap with Psycho Cut/Fly, Galarian Weezing closes with Brutal Swing (notably missing Sludge).

sources.videoTitle: EVERYTHING BUT KANTO CUP CHALLENGE!! | Pokémon GO Battle League
sources.author: Reis2TheOccasion

performanceNotes: Moltres with Fly was the star, sweeping through Shadow Snorlax and Hypno
Single-move Moltres still dominant thanks to Fly's high damage output
Galarian Farfetch'd forced an early shield despite a bad lead matchup
description: Galarian Farfetch'd lead with Moltres as the main carry and Galarian Rapidash on the team. Moltres ran single-move Fly and hard-carried the game.
Alolan Ninetales lead with Alolan Muk safe swap and Alolan Graveler closer running Volt Switch and Thunderbolt for electric coverage.

sources.author: Reis2TheOccasion
sources.videoTitle: EVERYTHING BUT KANTO CUP CHALLENGE!! | Pokémon GO Battle League

performanceNotes: Alolan Muk's Dark Pulse pressures Psychic and Ghost types
Alolan Graveler on Volt Switch provides unique electric-type pressure in Kanto Cup
Struggled against Venusaur closing games with Frenzy Plant

description: Triple Alolan team for the Anything But Kanto challenge. Alolan Marowak leads with Shadow Ball (over Shadow Bone for the 50 energy breakpoint), Shadow Alolan Sandslash safe swap, Alolan Raticate closer.

sources.videoTitle: EVERYTHING BUT KANTO CUP CHALLENGE!! | Pokémon GO Battle League
sources.author: Reis2TheOccasion

performanceNotes: Shadow Ball on Marowak lines up nicely at straight fives (50 energy)
Alolan Raticate's Dark/Normal typing gives strong resistances similar to Obstagoon
Shadow Alolan Sandslash threatens big damage with Drill Run and Ice Punch
